fault_hypothesis: The function incorrectly truncates the last byte of the concatenated data on line 80. The return statement should return the `data` variable unmodified instead of `data[:-1]`.

spec.expr: len(__cbfl_result) == sum(len(c[1]) for c in chunks)

constraints.intent: The length of the returned payload must equal the sum of the lengths of all input chunk data.

spec.expr: len(data) == sum(len(c[1]) for c in chunk_list__2)

constraints.intent: After concatenation, the data variable must hold all bytes from all chunks before the return.

spec.expr: sum(len(c[1]) for c in chunk_list__2) == sum(len(c[1]) for c in chunks)

constraints.intent: Sorting the chunks must not alter the total length of the data to be stitched.
